message.content:
@startuml
actor ユーザ
participant ブラウザ
participant web.php
participant Kouka1_1Controller
participant "Kouka1_1.index.blade.php"
participant "layout.kouka1_1.blade.php"
participant "components.menu.blade.php"
participant "components.subview.blade.php"

ユーザ -> ブラウザ : 該当ページをリクエスト[/kouka1_1]
ブラウザ -> web.php : GET[/kouka1_1]
web.php -> Kouka1_1Controller : @index
Kouka1_1Controller -> "Kouka1_1.index.blade.php"
"Kouka1_1.index.blade.php" -> "layout.kouka1_1.blade.php" : @extends
"layout.kouka1_1.blade.php" -> "Kouka1_1.index.blade.php"
"layout.kouka1_1.blade.php" -> "components.menu.blade.php" : @component
"components.menu.blade.php" -> "layout.kouka1_1.blade.php"
"layout.kouka1_1.blade.php" -> "components.subview.blade.php" : @include
"components.subview.blade.php" -> "layout.kouka1_1.blade.php"
@enduml
